sourceText: Stabilized the frontiers through a combination of military reforms, strategic alliances (including with the Cumans), and shrewd diplomacy. He leveraged the unexpected force of the First Crusade to reclaim key territories in Anatolia, initiating the Komnenian restoration.
translatedText: Tabbatar da iyakoki ta hanyar haɗakar gyare-gyaren soja, ƙawance na dabaru (ciki har da Cumans), da diflomasiyya mai wayo. Ya yi amfani da karfin da ba zato ba tsammani na Crusade na farko don kwato muhimman yankuna a Anatoliya, wanda ya fara mayar da Komneniya.

sourceText: What is needed in the most desperate moment is not flashy pride, but the cold courage to compromise in order to survive.
translatedText: Abin da ake buƙata a cikin mafi matsananciyar lokacin ba girman kai ba ne, amma ƙarfin hali don yin sulhu don tsira.

sourceText: It means the realistic wisdom of overcoming a crisis by negotiating with external forces while enduring humiliation amidst a national crisis.
translatedText: Yana nufin haƙiƙanin hikimar shawo kan rikici ta hanyar yin shawarwari da dakarun waje yayin da ake jure wulakanci a cikin rikicin ƙasa.

sourceText: Patient effort to fill the gaps and stand up cracked pillars extends the lifespan of a crumbling empire.
translatedText: Ƙoƙarin haƙuri don cike giɓi da tsayuwa ginshiƙan fashe yana ƙara tsawon rayuwar daular ruguzawa.

sourceText: It shows the patience of taking over a country on the verge of collapse from enemies on all sides and overcoming crises step by step.
translatedText: Hakan na nuni da irin hakurin da ake yi na kwace kasar da ke daf da durkushewa daga makiya daga kowane bangare da kuma shawo kan rikice-rikice mataki-mataki.

sourceText: Sometimes one hoists internal sails by borrowing a great external wind, but it is governance to steer so that the wind does not swallow the ship.
translatedText: Wani lokaci mutum ya ɗaga jirgin cikin gida ta hanyar aron babban iska daga waje, amma mulki ne don tuƙi don kada iska ta haɗiye jirgin.

sourceText: It refers to the insight of struggling not to lose the initiative while preventing immediate threats by drawing in foreign armies.
translatedText: Yana nufin fahimtar gwagwarmayar da ba za a rasa yunƙurin ba tare da hana barazanar kai tsaye ta hanyar shiga cikin sojojin kasashen waje.
